summary: Phase E.2 — Workforce Readiness Cliff Edge Widget + Care Task Scheduler tested. Backend 16/16 pytest PASS (cliff-edge endpoint shape/RBAC/snapshot persistence, 12 seeded templates, task CRUD, recurrence spawn-on-complete with weekly day-of-week math, staff RBAC restricting create/visibility/update scope, tasks dashboard manager+ gating, supervision bi-directional task creation with linked_supervision_id). Frontend code review confirms all required data-testid attributes exist in source (qa-tasks in both CHILDREN_ACTIONS+ADULT_ACTIONS, ops-tab-tasks + ops-tasks-view in HomeOperations, staffops-tab-tasks via testidPrefix in StaffOperationsHub, full /tasks page testids in TasksPage.jsx, dashboard widgets cliff-edge-widget + tasks-snapshot-widget). UI E2E click-through partially blocked by complex auth/sector-picker flow during automation, but main agent's prior smoke test confirmed render of widgets, qa-tasks tile, and /tasks page with 21 open / 7 overdue task rows.
critical_code_review_comments: Email/SMS notification transport is intentionally deferred (MOCKED) per user decision — tasks send no real notifications yet; only in-app data layer is real.
Bi-directional supervision-task linking is wired NOW; other auto-create rules (e.g. incident -> follow-up task) are deferred per user decision — confirmed in scope.

tc_readiness_snapshots collection persists snapshot on first cliff-edge GET each day — backend test test_cliff_edge_persists_snapshot validates idempotency and that trend contains exactly 30 points including today's persisted snapshot.
Recurrence math correctness explicitly verified: test_weekly_recurrence_with_day_of_week proves weekly + day_of_week=Tuesday from Tue 17 Feb spawns next at Tue 24 Feb (not Tue 17 + 1 day).

success_rate.frontend: Code-review verified; full E2E click-through deferred — main agent prior smoke confirmed render

test_credentials: Manager: manager@care.local / Manager@123 (tier 3); Staff: staff@care.local / Staff@123 (tier 1); Senior: senior@care.local / Senior@123 (tier 2). All confirmed working via /api/auth/login during this test run.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created during testing. The 12 scheduler_templates are seeded automatically on backend lifespan startup via seed_templates(db) and the existing test data (21 open / 7 overdue tasks) created by previous pytest runs is reused.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite for Phase E.2 lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration54_scheduler.py — covers 16 scenarios end-to-end and runs in ~6s. New collections introduced this iteration: tc_readiness_snapshots, scheduler_tasks, scheduler_templates. NOTE for UI automation: the app auth state lives in localStorage but key names are not cc_token/cc_user — use the live login form (input[type=email]/input[type=password] + button[type=submit]) and then click the 'Enter workspace' card on /welcome to select sector before navigating to dashboard. After login, manager lands on /welcome (sector picker) on first session, then dashboard. The qa-tasks tile is rendered in both children's and adult workflows so sector switch is safe. Email/SMS notification transport is explicitly MOCKED per user decision — do not test outbound notifications.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Phase E.2 implementation is complete and tests pass.
